faq.question: How long does project estimation take?
faq.answer: After receiving your brief, we provide a preliminary estimate within 1–2 business days. For complex systems, we run a 3–5 day discovery session with a detailed roadmap.

faq.question: What engagement models do you offer?
faq.answer: Dedicated team (Time & Material), fixed-scope projects, and audit/consulting. We choose the model together based on your goals and budget.

faq.question: Do you sign NDAs?
faq.answer: Yes. We work with confidential data from fintech, healthcare, and enterprise clients. We sign an NDA before discussing project details.

faq.question: How is communication organized during a project?
faq.answer: We assign a project manager and tech lead. Weekly demos, status reports in Slack/Teams, and access to Jira or your tool of choice. We fully cover UA and EU time zones.

faq.question: Do you provide post-launch support?
faq.answer: Yes. We offer SLA packages: monitoring, incident response, dependency updates, and feature development. Typical contracts start from 3 months.
